title: Pop-up notifications opening in new tab
excerpt: Currently, when users click on a pop-up notification on their desktop, it will bring them to a new tab on their browser instead of the current one they have open. Is there a way to have the notifications bring you to you…

posts.author: jcammarato (Joe Cammarato)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, when users click on a pop-up notification on their desktop, it will bring them to a new tab on their browser instead of the current one they have open. Is there a way to have the notifications bring you to your currently opened tab?

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jcammarato

When clicking on desktop push notifications, it will always open a new tab — it’s not possible at this time to have it open the relevant page within the account tab you already have open.

To learn more about our notifications, check out this helpful article: How do notifications work?

I hope this helps

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
